/* Target the terminal plugin's input highlighting */
.xterm-rows div {
    background-color: transparent !important;
}

/* Specifically for common Obsidian Terminal plugins */
.terminal-container .xterm-cursor-layer {
    background-color: transparent !important;
}

/* If the bar is caused by line-highlighting in the theme */
.markdown-rendered code, .terminal {
    --line-highlight-bg: transparent;
}
